findings.description: The class `TransactionManagementHandler` is mentioned in s1 content as an exclusive-use partner, but only `TransactionManagementHandler.Callback` (the inner interface) appears in hints. A user searching for `TransactionManagementHandler` would benefit from the class name being listed directly.
findings.source_evidence: 本ハンドラの機能はトランザクション管理機能とループ制御機能を兼ねているため :doc:`TransactionManagementHandler` および :doc:`RequestThreadLoopHandler` とは排他利用である。
